title: Container engines (Docker / Podman)
_comment: kind:container categories reclaim space from container engines. For each engine listed in 'engines' that is (a) one of the built-in whitelist docker/podman/nerdctl, (b) installed, and (c) running, the tool measures reclaimable space via '<engine> system df' and, on clean, runs the FIXED command '<engine> system prune -af'. The command is hard-coded (never taken from JSON) and volumes are NEVER pruned, so named volumes / databases stay safe.

categories.name: Docker / Podman reclaimable data
categories.desc: Stopped containers, unused images & build cache ('system prune -af'). Named volumes are never touched.
